hero.title: Untangle stuck pieces together
hero.subtitle: Response time · contact · help
hero.speech: Send us what got stuck. We'll start from the context.

response.body: We reply to messages within 2 business days (KST).

contact.accessibilityHint: Opens your mail app with the support address.

faq.question: How do I start capturing?
faq.answer: Write what comes to mind on the capture screen. 2nd-Brain helps organize it later.

faq.question: How is my data stored, and can I export it?
faq.answer: Your entries stay tied to your account only. Use Export in Settings to download your data as a file anytime.

faq.question: Is the AI safe?
faq.answer: AI helps organize and connect your notes. Important decisions stay with you.
